ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "variant" TEXT /* Game variant played by the player */,
  "server" TEXT /* Server where the player is logged in */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Current level of the player */,
  "character_class" TEXT /* Class of the character */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the character */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment of the character */,
  "time_played" INTEGER /* Total time played in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "death_logs" (
  "death_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each death log entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who died */,
  "killer" TEXT /* Description of the killer (e.g., monster type) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the death occurred */,
  "location" TEXT /* In-game location where the player died */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the player at the time of death */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the player at the time of death */,
  "mana" INTEGER /* Mana points of the player at the time of death */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* JSON string describing the player's equipment at the time of death */,
  "cause_of_death" TEXT /* Detailed description of the cause of death */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("death_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_death_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES player_stats ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "servers" (
  "server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each server */,
  "server_name" TEXT /* Name of the server */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the server */,
  "player_count" INTEGER /* Number of players currently logged in */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game variant */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the game variant */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variant's features */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game variant */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the game variant */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the variant has been downloaded */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player participating in the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game variant used in the session */,
  "server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the server where the session took place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Single Player, Multiplayer) */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_variant_id FOREIGN KEY ("variant_id") REFERENCES game_variants ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("server_id") REFERENCES servers ("server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player account */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "signup_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last login */,
  "last_logout" TEXT /* Timestamp of the player's last logout */,
  "total_sessions" INTEGER /* Total number of sessions the player has played */,
  "total_play_time" INTEGER /* Total time the player has spent playing in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, player) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "admin_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each admin log entry */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the admin taking the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action taken */,
  "affected_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player affected by the action (if applicable) */,
  "affected_session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session affected by the action (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_affected_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_session_id") REFERENCES game_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_admin_logs_affected_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("affected_player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
